holdings.infoBox: IINC is an equity ETF with a total of 114 individual holdings. The top holdings are OTHER ASSETS AND LIABILITIES stock at 102.26%, Cash Offset at 2.54%, Microsoft at 1.46%, GE HealthCare Technologies at 1.38%, and Lennar at 1.38%.

overview.description: The Alki Consolidated Income ETF (IINC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The Alki Consolidated Income ETF (the Fund) investment objective is to seek income. IINC was launched on Jun 24, 2026 and is issued by Alki.
